entries.title: Empire Survives the First Death Star Loss

content.fact: The destruction of the first Death Star is a major Rebel victory but does not collapse the Empire.
content.injection: After Yavin, keep the Empire militarily dominant and politically intact; the Rebel victory inspires resistance but does not end Imperial rule. Use this as a background rule only; narrower active era/source cards should override it.
constraints: Apply only when the active Saga Context overlaps: After Yavin, before Hoth.
Keep retrieval topic/entity-gated; this wide-context card should not flood unrelated scenes.
antiLore: Do not treat later-era, alternate-continuity, or fanon facts as true in this Context unless the user explicitly selected that branch.

entries.title: Rebels Cannot Safely Remain on Yavin

content.fact: The Yavin base becomes unsafe after the Death Star battle because Imperial retaliation is expected.
content.injection: After Yavin, Rebel scenes should account for evacuation, dispersal, and the search for safer hidden bases. Treat conflicting later-era or alternate-continuity model memory as out of context unless the user explicitly selects that branch.
constraints: Apply only when the active Saga Context overlaps: After Yavin, before Hoth.
Keep retrieval topic/entity-gated; this wide-context card should not flood unrelated scenes.

entries.title: Alliance Operates as Mobile Cells and Fleets

content.fact: The Rebellion relies on hidden bases, mobile fleets, and distributed cells rather than a stable capital.
content.injection: During the Galactic Civil War, avoid giving the Rebels open territorial security unless a local cell or temporary base is established. Use this as a background rule only; narrower active era/source cards should override it.
constraints: Apply only when the active Saga Context overlaps: After Yavin, before Hoth.
Keep retrieval topic/entity-gated; this wide-context card should not flood unrelated scenes.

entries.title: Vader Becomes Interested in the Yavin Pilot

content.fact: After Yavin, Vader investigates the Force-sensitive pilot who destroyed the Death Star.
content.injection: Post-Yavin scenes involving Vader may treat Luke as an object of growing personal and strategic interest, but not yet as fully known son status to all parties. Use this as a background rule only; narrower active era/source cards should override it.
constraints: Apply only when the active Saga Context overlaps: After Yavin, before Hoth.

content.fact: Luke’s immediate post-Yavin development is as Rebel pilot and commander, not as a formal Jedi student.
content.injection: Between Yavin and Hoth, emphasize Luke’s piloting, Rebel missions, and limited Force intuition rather than polished Jedi discipline. Use this as a background rule only; narrower active era/source cards should override it.

entries.title: Leia Functions as Rebel Leader in the Field

content.fact: Leia is not merely symbolic royalty; she acts as a field leader, organizer, and military-political decision maker.
content.injection: In Rebellion Era scenes, Leia can command, negotiate, brief, and make hard operational calls while also carrying Alderaan trauma. Use this as a background rule only; narrower active era/source cards should override it.
constraints: Apply only when the active Saga Context overlaps: After Yavin, before Hoth.
Keep retrieval topic/entity-gated; this wide-context card should not flood unrelated scenes.

content.fact: The Alliance often lacks ships, fuel, safe ports, parts, medical resources, and political protection.
content.injection: Use scarcity as a normal Rebel constraint; missions should often hinge on logistics, secrecy, and repair, not abundance. Use this as a background rule only; narrower active era/source cards should override it.

content.fact: Smugglers and fugitives can be pressured through bounty hunters, debts, and Imperial notices.

content.fact: Echo Base is hidden on Hoth because the world is remote, hostile, and unlikely as a major settlement.
content.injection: Before the Empire finds Hoth, write Echo Base as a fragile hidden outpost where environment and secrecy matter as much as defense. Use this as a background rule only; narrower active era/source cards should override it.
constraints: Apply only when the active Saga Context overlaps: After Yavin, before Hoth.

entries.title: Echo Base Has Severe Environmental Hazards

content.fact: Hoth’s cold, fauna, and isolation are operational threats even before the Empire attacks.
content.injection: At Echo Base, include cold exposure, patrol risk, shelter dependence, and limited emergency margins. Do not import later-era status, relationships, factions, or outcomes into this window.
constraints: Apply only when the active Saga Context overlaps: After Yavin, before Hoth.

entries.title: Han and Leia Romance Is Tense and Unresolved

content.fact: Before and during Hoth, Han and Leia have obvious tension but no settled romantic partnership.
content.injection: Write pre-Bespin Han/Leia as argumentative, mutually drawn, and unresolved; do not jump to stable couple dynamics too early. Use this as a background rule only; narrower active era/source cards should override it.
constraints: Apply only when the active Saga Context overlaps: After Yavin, before Hoth.
